payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark brown wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and a narrow vertical groove/handle at the left; surface shows worn, scuffed painted finish and uneven discoloration in dim lighting, and the image crop cuts off parts of the frame indicating the object is partially visible — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
